calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-15-2021 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Set For Trial On Sep-27-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Dec-30-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via CourtCall:
Jason N. Wolford, Esq., (415) 649-6203, appearing for Christine Gayoso and Jhon Paul Gayoso Martinez, Plaintiff
No other appearances.

Hearing held. Mr. Wolford stated that he did not contest the tentative ruling.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT IRENE NI, DAVID NI, LILIN NI Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike is DENIED. Facts in support of request for punitive damages are sufficiently alleged. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald Evan Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
